summary: BioLens Iteration 6 - Final Integration Pass Testing Complete. All core features working: Homepage (hero, search, scan button, explainer cards, Global Impact Counters), Search Autocomplete (Supabase RPC search_biolens_autocomplete), Results Page (material info, Petroload score, Risk Signals, Better Alternatives, Where to Buy with FiberFoundry products, Purchase Impact), Share functionality, Scan History, and Backend barcode lookup with 3-step cascade.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) returns 200 OK
Backend search for 'polyester hoodie' - returns Polyester, Petro-Based, High risk, alternatives
Backend search for 'hemp shirt' - returns Hemp, Plant-Based, Low risk
Backend search for 'bamboo sheets' - returns Bamboo, Plant-Based
Backend barcode lookup (/api/barcode/lookup) - returns product info from upcitemdb provider
Backend materials list (/api/materials) - returns 20+ materials
Backend single material (/api/materials/polyester) - returns detailed material info
Homepage loads with hero section, search bar, scan button, example searches
Global Impact Counters section renders with 4 stat cards (Total Scans, Purchases, Petro $ Replaced, Microplastic Avoided)
Global Impact shows zeros from Supabase (as expected per test requirements)
Search autocomplete triggers on typing 'poly' - dropdown appears with suggestions from search_biolens_autocomplete RPC
Autocomplete shows material names, aliases, and type badges
Autocomplete keyboard navigation (ArrowDown + Enter) works and navigates to results
Results page for 'polyester hoodie': shows Polyester, Petro-Based, HIGH PETRO-RISK badge
Results page Petroload Score: 95/100 (Very High Petroload)
Results page Material Health Score: 49/100
Results page Risk Signals section: displays Pesticide Risk, Synthetic Fertilizer, Processing Chemicals, Herbicide Risk bars
Results page Better Alternatives section: shows Hemp, Linen, Wool alternatives
Results page Where to Buy section: shows 5 FiberFoundry product cards
FiberFoundry products show: FIBERFOUNDRY badge (star), title, brand, price, transparency score, trust score, petroload score, buy links
FiberFoundry Verified badge visible in Where to Buy section header
Results page Purchase Impact section: shows Est. Petro Cost ($6.17), Jobs Multiplier, Carbon Proxy Savings, Microplastic Shedding
Share button opens Share Card modal with material info, petroload score, alternatives
Results page for 'hemp shirt': shows Plant-Based, LOW PETRO-RISK, Petroload 8/100, Health Score 87/100
Hemp results show 'Great material choice' section (no alternatives for good materials)
Hemp results Purchase Impact section shows no microplastic stat (correct for plant-based)
Scan history saves after search and displays on homepage with material info, score, timestamp
PWA service worker registered
Explainer cards (Material Check, Why It Matters, Better Alternatives) visible
No console errors detected
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Supabase integrations verified working: search_biolens_scan_enriched, get_best_alternative_products_for_query, get_product_purchase_sources, get_global_impact_counters, search_biolens_autocomplete. The autocomplete suggestion click has a minor timing issue but keyboard navigation works perfectly. Global Impact counters show zeros which is correct (Supabase data is zeros). FiberFoundry products display correctly with full product cards including transparency/trust/petroload scores. Purchase Impact calculations use frontend adapter (impact.js) as the Supabase calculate_biolens_impact function doesn't exist - this is working as designed.
